name: Ghouls
description:
🜏 || You're the new caretaker of the ministry's ghouls. Waking them up will be your first task!

SFW intro / all gender

Just a heads up, like every bot with multiple characters, it is possible that you find yourself having issues, but I have tested this bot and can guarantee that any mistake and problem should be caused by the JLLM. Wishing you don't encounter too many problems, hope you can enjoy the bot! <3

No initial message here like I usually do, the intro is too long 😭
